header.type: fixed pill nav, top:16px, white bg, radius 16px, shadow, max-w 1216px, w calc(100%-32px)
header.links_hover: text-primary on hover (default text-secondary/tertiary, active=Home dark)

pricing_toggle.selector: input[aria-label='Toggle annual billing'] (checkbox peer sr-only, checked=Annually default)
pricing_toggle.track: h-6 w-11 rounded-xl border #BDB2FF bg-primary-base; checked bg-primary-dark; knob size-5 white translate-x on checked

faq_accordion.behavior: click toggles open/close; first (What is Finorio?) open by default; closed=+ icon, open=- icon; answer panel expands

items.a: Finorio helps startups and creators build beautiful landing pages, manage tasks, and grow faster — all from one dashboard.
No, Finorio is a drag-and-drop builder that allows you to create landing pages and manage tasks without any coding knowledge.

items.q: Can I use my own domain?
items.a: Yes, you can use your own domain with Finorio. You can also use a custom subdomain.
Your data is encrypted, protected, and always under your control — with enterprise-grade security.
Yes, Finorio offers a free plan that includes 10 landing pages and 10 tasks.

password_eye.behavior: eye icon toggles password input type=password<->text

scroll_reveals.behavior: sections fade/translate-up on scroll into view (IntersectionObserver style). Feature/dashboard images and cards animate in. Hero phone + stats. Use opacity 0->1 + translateY 24px->0, ~0.6s ease-out, staggered.

hover.buttons: slight darken/scale; nav links color to text-primary; pricing/testimonial/feature cards subtle shadow lift; app badges opacity/scale; social icons bg darken
